hooks.command: in=$(cat); printf '%s' "$in" | grep -qF "@'" && printf '%s' "$in" | grep -qF "'@" && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"PowerShell here-string markers (@-quote ... quote-@) detected in a bash git commit; they corrupt the message with stray @ lines.
